scroll_found.title: Research the Night Table scroll at a Research Pedestal

night_feast.title: Eat 5 different foods and drink 1 brewed beverage during the nighttime hours (no sleep skipping)

subtitle.text: They didn't sleep through the dark. They ate through it.

description: CH.04 · THE NIGHT TABLE
▸ The scroll describes a practice:
a table set at dusk, not dawn.
The best food was served when the sky went dark.
It was a way of saying: we are still here.
◈ NIGHT MECHANICS TO KNOW
└ Sleep Hunger mod: sleeping skips time BUT
costs hunger — you wake up hungry
└ Comforts sleeping bags: rest without hunger cost
(but doesn't set spawn point)
└ The Night Table says: stay awake sometimes
The nighttime food buffs are worth it
└ Hardcore Torches run out at night too —
keep lanterns lit
◈ NIGHT TABLE TRADITION
└ Set your cooking station near your bed
└ Brew a drink before sleeping if you plan to skip
└ The full diet bonuses carry into the next day
└ A warm meal before sleep = better morning stats
◈ SCROLL: The Night Table
└ Found in: inn chests, tavern basement loot,
nighttime camp caches, abandoned rest stops
└ Research time: 10 min
└ Unlocks: Sleep Hunger + Comforts interaction knowledge,
nighttime meal awareness
▸ The scroll was written by someone who never slept early.
They outlived everyone who did.
▶ Find The Night Table scroll [check]
▶ Eat 5 foods and drink 1 brewed beverage at night [check]
◇ Comforts mod (Ch01 reference): sleeping bag
skips night without setting spawn and
without the Sleep Hunger cost.
